title: TIESOME Luxury Metal Fountain Pen Set, 0.5mm Fine Nib Fountain Pen with 6 2.6mm Black Ink Cartridges Smooth Writing Pen Gift for Business Office Journaling Men Women
features: 【Luxury Metal Fountain Pen】 This metal fountain pen set has a luxurious and exquisite appearance, simple and elegant, suitable for business people. The surface of each fine point pen boasts a smooth texture, offering a comfortable grip. The glossy black barrel, accompanied by a gold clip, adds an attractive touch to these fountain pens. Moreover, the convenient clip on the pen tip ensures the easy portability of this black fountain pen.

【Fine Point Writing】 This fountain pen for smooth writing uses an F nib, and the writing line effect is equivalent to a gel ink pen of about 0.5 mm. The exquisite pen tip allows you to write smoothly, providing you with accurate and precise lines and allowing you to regain the joy of writing. It is very suitable for daily writing, calligraphy, sketching, and handwriting.

【With Ink Cartridges】 This metal fountain pen set includes all the essentials for pen writing, making it perfect for both beginners and seasoned pen users. The writing pen set contains 1 metal fountain pen (including 1 ink converter), and 6 pieces of 2.6mm black ink cartridges. The ample supply of ink cartridges ensures convenient replacement and meets your long-term writing needs.

【How to Load Ink】 Simply attach the converter, insert the pen into the ink, and twist the button until the converter fills. The second method is to insert the ink cartridges directly into the pen body and apply gentle pressure until you hear a "click" sound. Two options of ink supplement ways can meet the needs of both novice and experienced pen users.

【Perfect Gift】Our calligraphy pen is the perfect writing tool for personal use or as a gift for college and university graduates, literary writers, calligraphers, journaling enthusiasts, and anyone who appreciates fine writing. Whether for birthdays, holidays, or other special occasions, our Fountain Pen Set is sure to make a lasting impression.
description: "-----------------Welcome To Our Shop-----------------" Packing List: 1 x Luxury Fountain Pen 6 x 2.6mm Ink Cartridges Specification Size: Pen: 13.7cm/5.39inch Pen Nib: 0.5mm fine point Suitable for 2.6mm ink cartridges Material: metal Color: Black ❤ Service Customer satisfaction is essential to us, if you have any problems with our items or services, please feel free to contact us.
